languages.text: "Это все, что мне удалось узнать. Ваши мнения?"
"That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"
languages.original_text: "Это все, что мне удалось узнать. Ваши мнения?"

traits.locale_text: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"
"That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"
"That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"

languages.text: “这就是我目前找到的全部线索。你们有什么看法？”
languages.original_text: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"

traits.locale_text: “这就是我目前找到的全部线索。你们有什么看法？”

languages.text: «Es todo lo que he podido descubrir. ¿Qué opina?».
languages.original_text: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"

traits.locale_text: «Es todo lo que he podido descubrir. ¿Qué opina?».

languages.text: « C'est tout ce que j'ai découvert. Qu'en pensez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"

traits.locale_text: « C'est tout ce que j'ai découvert. Qu'en pensez-vous ? »

languages.text: "Mehr konnte ich nicht herausfinden. Was denkt Ihr?"
languages.original_text: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"

traits.locale_text: "Mehr konnte ich nicht herausfinden. Was denkt Ihr?"

languages.text: "Keşfetmeyi başarabildiğim her şey bu kadar. Düşüncelerin neler?"
languages.original_text: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"

traits.locale_text: "Keşfetmeyi başarabildiğim her şey bu kadar. Düşüncelerin neler?"

languages.text: 「私が発見したものはこれだけです。あなたの考えは？」
languages.original_text: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"

traits.locale_text: 「私が発見したものはこれだけです。あなたの考えは？」
